releases.author: andrewmarconi
releases.description:
## Google Drive Folder Link v1.0.1

Initial release of the Obsidian plugin for linking Google Drive folders to notes.

### Features

- **OAuth 2.0 authentication** — Desktop loopback flow, each user provides their own Google Cloud credentials
- **Fuzzy folder search** — Search across folders in configured root directories using Obsidian's native fuzzy matcher
- **Shared Drives + My Drive** — Two-step root picker supports both personal and shared drives
- **Recursive folder tree** — BFS crawl caches the full folder hierarchy in memory with manual refresh
- **One-click access** — Clickable URL in the Properties pane opens the linked folder in your browser
- **Commands & context menus** — "Attach Google Drive folder..." and "Open attached Google Drive folder" available from command palette and right-click menu

### Setup

Requires a Google Cloud project with OAuth 2.0 Desktop app credentials and the `drive.readonly` scope. See the [README](https://github.com/andrewmarconi/GoogleDriveFolderLink#setup) for step-by-step instructions.

### Fixes

This release fixes issues with the original 1.0.0 release.
